name: Orange Onion Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the chicken in oil and drain.
2. Add 1 cup water, orange juice, onion, broth, and ginger to the skillet. Cover and simmer until the chicken juices run clear, about 20-25 minutes.
3. Remove the chicken and keep it warm.
4. Mix cornstarch with the remaining water in a separate bowl.
5. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the skillet, cooking and stirring until thickened and bubbly. Continue to cook and stir for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Add the orange sections and heat through.
7. Serve over the chicken.
